pending.body: finding_summary: `handle_propose_new_bead()` trusts `ProposedBeadCreated` journal entries and returns before querying `br`, so a follow-up bead that was later removed from `.beads` or lost its dependency on the active bead is treated as already created and never recreated or repaired. affected_files: ["src/contexts/milestone_record/service.rs"] refs: src/contexts/milestone_record/service.rs:2838-2848,2970-2975 severity: medium remediation_hint: Verify the journaled `created_bead_id` with `br show` (and repair the dependency if needed) before returning; if the bead is missing, fall back to the normal search/create path.

finding_summary: The defensive re-check reclassifies any open/in-progress/deferred bead with the same normalized title as planned-elsewhere, without checking `finding_summary`, `proposed_scope`, or `rationale`. A generic title collision will therefore suppress creation of genuinely new follow-up work and record a verified mapping to the wrong bead. affected_files: ["src/contexts/milestone_record/service.rs"] refs: src/contexts/milestone_record/service.rs:2978-2984,3034-3056 severity: high remediation_hint: Require a stronger semantic match before reclassifying (for example compare the rendered description/scope or another stable fingerprint), and only mark the mapping verified after that richer match succeeds.

finding_summary: `reconcile_proposed_beads_after_success()` treats payload listing failures, aggregate parse failures, and missing propose-new-bead metadata as non-blocking and continues success reconciliation. Because propose-new-bead amendments are no longer queued anywhere else, those accepted findings are silently lost instead of keeping reconciliation open for retry. affected_files: ["src/contexts/automation_runtime/success_reconciliation.rs"] refs: src/contexts/automation_runtime/success_reconciliation.rs:935-943,968-977,987-998 severity: medium remediation_hint: Once a final-review aggregate is expected for the run, bubble these cases up as `ReconciliationError::MilestoneUpdateFailed` so operators can retry rather than completing the bead with dropped follow-up work.

status_summary: running: final review restart round 5 -> Plan and Implement
